required_operator_inputs: replace the ad hoc harness-completion stop-line with a deterministic scoped salt_ndepend-style coverage program
pattern the local quality gate on the noether-pack loop with machine-readable baselines, contracts, doctor, parity, and family-parity surfaces
keep advanced-color, preset, composition, and new-fractal product work frozen until that deterministic coverage gate is explicitly satisfied
treat existing local audits and runtime harness tests as packet producers for the new coverage program rather than as standalone final authority

require deterministic action-level hostile review before every meaningful action exactly as the mainline repo does, naming the suspected failure mode, correct owner/action, proof surface, and blocked action
forbidden_operator_prompts: resume advanced-color implementation while the salt_ndepend coverage gate is still open
start preset code before the deterministic coverage gate closes
start multi-function composition or new fractal work before the deterministic coverage gate closes
treat helper-only audits or runtime harness witnesses as sufficient final authority without the packeted coverage program

continue exploration, edits, validation, helper closeout, commit/push, worker routing, merge-control, or final response without an action-level hostile review check naming the suspected failure mode, correct owner/action, proof surface, and blocked action

required_acceptance_assertions.description: The harness-completion phased plan stays synchronized
The harness-completion hostile audit validates as complete
The deterministically regenerated salt_ndepend doctor packet reports freeze_ready=true
